name: a7_secret_kernel
outcome_goal: rg 'os\.environ\.get\(.*(API_KEY|SECRET|TOKEN)' Code&DBs/Workflow --type py returns only hits inside adapters/keychain.py; all other callsites route through resolve_secret(name, *, scope) exported from keychain.py.

jobs.label: a7_secret_kernel
jobs.prompt: On branch praxis/kernel-secret, consolidate secret access behind Code&DBs/Workflow/adapters/keychain.py. Touched scope: Code&DBs/Workflow/adapters/credentials.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/registry/provider_execution_registry.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/integrations/connector_executor.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/workflow/execution_backends.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/adapters/keychain.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/integration/test_secret_kernel.py. Export resolve_secret(name, *, scope) from keychain.py. Replace direct os.environ.get reads for API_KEY/SECRET/TOKEN outside keychain with resolve_secret. Never put API keys in plaintext .env. File decision.2026-04-20.kernel-secret-consolidation. Verify with the integration test and grep. Open a PR to public referencing the decision row; do not merge if verifier is red.
